dashboard.label: Regulator Evidence Pack
dashboard.description: PDF-exportable evidence pack with NIST AI RMF + SR 26-2 framing, gated by jurisdictional_tag for HIPAA / PCI / FSI profiles. Full Dashboard Studio v2 implementation lands in story-app-07; this stub keeps the nav link resolvable.

html.p: This dashboard is a placeholder. The full implementation (PDF export, NIST AI RMF function alignment, SR 26-2 framing, and jurisdictional_tag-gated panels for HIPAA Safe Harbor 18, PCI DSS 11.x, FFIEC-AIML) lands in story-app-07.
The profile index that gates panel visibility is bootstrapped by enabling the Aegis - Bootstrap profile index saved search (Settings > Searches, reports, and alerts).
